message:
🌱 Add antrea: Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests mission (#926)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "antrea-2014-reduce-runtime-of-antrea-e2e-tests",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "antrea: Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests",
+    "description": "Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current antrea deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your antrea version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
helm list -n antrea 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working antrea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review antrea configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant antrea configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get configmap -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=antrea
```
As we add more features and more tests, the runtime of tests has been increasing steadily."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests",
+        "description": "Add namespaceSelector/podSelector validations in all CRD schema.

The incorrect input of labelSelector fields that have known schema should be rejected;

In the following example, we want to create ClusterNetworkPolicy resource:

spec.appliedTo.namespaceSelector must be matchLabels or
```yaml
apiVersion: crd.antrea.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterNetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: blacklist
spec:
    priority: 5
    tier: securityops
    appliedTo:
      - namespaceSelector:
          matchLables:
            env: dummy
    ingress:
      - action: Drop
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade antrea to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade antrea:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade antrea antrea/antrea --namespace antrea
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea
helm list -n antrea
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n antrea -l app.kubernetes.io/name=antrea
kubectl get events -n antrea --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Reduce runtime of Antrea e2e tests" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add namespaceSelector/podSelector validations in all CRD schema.

The incorrect input of labelSelector fields that have known schema should be rejected;

In the following example, we want to create ClusterNetworkPolicy resource:

spec.appliedTo.namespaceSelector must be matchLabels or matchExpressions, 
actually in the existing version the spelling mistake ‘matchLables’ can not be checked out.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: crd.antrea.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterNetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: blacklist
spec:
    priority: 5
    tier: securityops
    appliedTo:
      - namespaceSelector:
          matchLables:
            env: dummy
    ingress:
      - action: Drop",
+        "antctl_test.go
antreapolicy_test.go
bandwidth_test.go
basic_test.go
batch_test.go
clustergroup_test.go
connectivity_test.go
egress_test.go
flowaggregator_test.go
framework_test.go
ipsec_test.go
legacyantreapolicy_test.go
legacyclustergroup_test.go
main_test.go
networkpolicy_test.go
nodeportlocal_test.go
performance_test.go
prometheus_test.go
proxy_test.go
security_test.go
service_test.go
supportbundle_test.go
tls_test.go
traceflow_test.go
upgrade_test.go"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "antrea",
+      "sandbox",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "Ingress",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Customresourcedefinition"
+    ],

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "antctl",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with antrea installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
